topic.description: Research topic — required. Drives the entire AI search.

platforms.description: Preferred platforms (e.g., ['reddit', 'hackernews']). When omitted, the AI suggests the best mix.

minUrls.description: Suggested floor for URL count (passed to AI as a soft target). Defaults to 10.

minCommunities.description: Suggested floor for community count. Defaults to 5.

minQueries.description: Suggested floor for search-query count. Defaults to 5.
